name: triager
description: Per-issue dispatch: classify ONE open GitHub Issue (kind:impl|kind:consider|kind:design). Single responsibility — labels exactly one kind:* on the target. Does NOT assign order:N (priority is the prioritizer's role; see workflow.json#prioritizer.agent). The chosen label is applied via the poll:state boundary hook (gh issue edit) using the AI structured output's issue.labels.add field. Use .agent/triager/script/dispatch.sh to fan out kind-less issues; this binary handles ONE issue per invocation.

issue.description: GitHub Issue number to triage in this invocation (per-issue dispatch).

repository.description: Optional owner/repo override for gh state checks. Default: current repo (gh context).

workflow.description: Path to the downstream workflow JSON used to derive the kind:* label set (labelMapping keys filtered to kind:*). The triager refuses to label an issue that already carries any kind:* label — order:N, done, need clearance presence does not block re-classification of an issue that has not yet been kind-labeled.
